name: 爪子刀（★） | 自由之手
descriptionEn: With its curved blade mimicking a tiger's claw, the karambit was developed as part of the southeast Asian martial discipline of silat. The knife is typically used with a reverse grip, with the finger ring on the index finger. It has been painted black and purple, then decorated with a metallic marker.
descriptionZh: 其弯曲的刀片如同猛虎的利爪一般，爪子刀是作为东南亚马来武术的一部分被研制出来的。这把匕首通常是用食指和无名指反握使用的。 这件武器有黑色与紫色的涂装，再使用金属符号装饰。
